items.value:
Party Present
It's a mystery box, what could be inside of it?
Nobody knows! It's definitely gonna give you a surprise!

Dangerous Hammer
Use it responsibly, it's just way more dangerous than it looks!
Be careful to not break any windows or squish people with it!

Hard Hat
Dealing with PRESSING (down) situations? Use this! It'll protect your head from being squished.
Isn't that such a cool invention?!

Bell
Someone took the bell out of the alarm clock!
Leave it on the ground to alarm Baldi once someone steps over it!
Such a funny prank!

Global Position Displayer
This handy device is connected to EVERYONE!
It'll connect to your map and show everyone's locations!
Though, we can't pay for its connection forever.

Pencil
A normal pencil for normal uses, it is still prohibited to stab people in the halls.
But it does freeze them, just aim correctly...
don't tell that to Principal!
Screwdriver Very useful for machines! So many uses! See a machine, or, even a robot? Just use it on em'!

Bear Trap
Someone took this from Baldi's camping gear, it's dangerous!
Leave it on the ground to catch somebody.
Just don't step on it, you wouldn't like to be stuck!

Gum
Beans sometimes drop his secret weapon, so why not sell it here?
It's quite sticky!

Speed Potion
A special potion being one of the most basic inventions by Baldi!
Just drink it and run as far as you can!
Don't dose past two!

Baldi's Super Energy Drink
The first BSODA competitor, made by Baldi himself.
Try it out, and you'll regenerate stamina faster and lose less!
It's a double advantage!

Golden Quarter
This SHINIER golden quarter made by Baldi will grant you three shiny quarters,
each use is a quarter to your pocket!
Use it wisely!

Empty Bottle
This bottle isn't useful now,
but maybe you could fill it up with water from a fountain to MAKE it useful!

Water Bottle
Stored water that'll energize you up!
You can always refill it again with the fountain!

Headache Pill
Have you suffered from headache upon being blinded or seeing hallucinations?
Well not to worry, this instant pill will cure your suffering!

Basketball
An ordinary ball, but bounces a lot!
Be careful to not hit someone with it, you're not a bully, are you?

Pogostick
Avoid people by jumping over them.
You can jump from head to head easily, squishing everybody in the way!
You can boing around with ease. Boing! Boing!
Hot Chocolate This delicious chocolate is always hot and so will heat you during freezing periods. Makes you lose less stamina, but you will take longer to gain it again.

Invisibility Remote Control
This remote makes you invisible!
Anything can still interact with you, but won't see you!
How amazing!

Cherry BSODA
A strong modified version of the Bsoda, with a good taste of cherry!
It's even able of bouncing off the walls!

Soap Bar
This is a lot more slippery than a Nana Peel!
Just throw it in the floor and let it slip by itself!
Be careful to not let it carry you around!

Blow Drier
Need quick speed? Use the Blow Drier!
This item launches you backwards at incredible speeds, and should not be underestimated!

Comically Large Trumpet
Wanted to get someone to stop annoying you? Just blow this!
It's so loud it'll blow them away! It's not overkill at all!

Strong Magnet
A strong smart magnet designed specifically to pull everything except the one who threw it!
It lasts 10 seconds.

Throwable Teleporter
Feeling like someone is following you? Well, not to worry!
You can throw this thing to send them away from you!

Sugar Flavored Zesty Bar
Mix up a sugary bar with more sugar, and there you go!
This gives you 400% more stamina for a short period!
... And also cuts your stamina in half due to low sugar level, but for a short period too!

Rotten Cheese
Where did this came from?! Get it out of here! It's too smelly!
Everyone's gonna run away from this if they see it on the floor!

Soap Bubbles
Ever wanted to blow your own strong bubbles?
You can do it through this item!
Just blow it and let it carry anyone around!
Grape BSODA A dynamic modified version of the Bsoda, with a good taste of grape! For each person being pushed by this, its speed is decreased by half!

There's a sign near the beehive entrance. You read it: Hello fellow human! I BEE-lieve we can be useful in dangerous situations. Do you feel threatened? Just throw this Beehive! We are the BEE-st in our BEE-nfesive job!

Super Camera
A very powerful camera, it can shoot photos up to ∞x∞ resolution!
It even guarantees that everyone in the photo will be immediately frozen.
For a perfect shoot, stunning is the best solution!

Sticky Gun
Have you ever dreamed of picking up anything from far away?
Now you can do that with this powerful sticky gun!
That includes items and notebooks!

Toilet Paper
Just an ordinary toilet paper, but with some unique powers.
Throw it at someone and let it bounce off, might let them stuck for a while.

Picture
A picture taken by Camera Stand. Surely not a bad one :)
You couldn't stare at that ugly picture...

Crumpled Paper
In the depths of such thin object, a very ugly image can be seen...
Either way, just throw it at somebody to stall them for a while.

Fidget Spinner
Ever wanted to get somewhere, but you're too lazy?
 Well just break psychics! This "trendy" fidget won't act as small as it seems!
Frying Pan Needs self-defense? Use this frying pan to push any problems to your side - literally.
Electrical Gel A recreation of Rollbot's efficient electricity, but inside a single bottle with electrical gel. Throw it at a hallway to slow down anyone who passes through.

Door Stopper
Do you want to keep a door open for some time? Use this!
Storm in a Bag With this bag of unknown origin, you can summon a mini storm! It'll zap EVERYTHING nearby!

Baldi's Secret Key
Baldi left this... Rumor has it, this'll open up a secret lab!
For an ending...

Mr. Molar
A cheap toy, each winding is a stronger bite!
Just don't let it bite you!
Cleaning Cloth A cheap cloth with the special power of sucking any ink or dirty chalk! When it gets dirty, you can always wash it again in a Water Fountain!
Dirty Cleaning Cloth Looks like it got all dirty! You can always wash it in a Water Fountain!

Baldi's Yearbook
Don't you remember someone from the schoolhouse?
This yearbook might give you a quick mind refresh!
You'll always find one in the Principal's Office.
Looks like this character is missing from our collection! I wonder if this one joined the schoolhouse later than the rest...

Chilly Chilli
This Chillie is chilly!
Eat one and you’ll start to breath cold, refreshing breeze like some kind of yeti, with a great minty after-taste!

Comically Large Jello
This Jello is so big you can't even take a proper bite!
It could dangerously swallow you into it!

Sketchbook
Some kid dropped their super personal notebook. It has the magical power of summoning crudely drawn characters!
They'll like to help you by fighting other people!

Firework Rocket
Launch yourself forward with a super propulsion!
Over time, it gains a lot of speed, but you might lose control quickly!
Be careful to not hit any wall!

Slingshot
This is very useful for self-defense!
Hold it for a few seconds to hit someone from a far distance,

Good Grades
A flawless exam that makes Baldi proud of you!
He never checks who answered it, so he'll just praise blindly at whoever is nearby!

AAAAHH Tomato
A living tomato that loves to be alive!
Surely nothing could possibly harm him if he was left on the floor...
Principal won't like if he hypothetically suffered any damage...

Ice Skates
This powerful skates can not only glide over ice, but on every floor material that exists!
It's a bit hard to control, but you'll get used to it.
